.file-embed.background: rgb(63, 61, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(48, 42, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(22, 21, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(22, 21, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(22, 21, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 21, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(48, 42, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(48, 42, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(111, 128, 77, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(22, 21, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(48, 42, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(63, 61, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(63, 61, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(63, 61, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(63, 61, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
